Risk Description: Because of defect density of ~22.19 bugs per KLOC which is 11 times higher than the expected threshold of 2 bugs per KLOC, there is a risk that quality standards are severely compromised, which could lead to production defects, customer dissatisfaction, and significant rework costs post-deployment.
